content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/main.cpp:
     1	#include "SYsULexer.h" // 确保这里的头文件名与您生成的词法分析器匹配
     2	#include <fstream>
     3	#include <iostream>
     4	#include <unordered_map>
     5	
     6	// 映射定义，将ANTLR的tokenTypeName映射到clang的格式
     7	std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> tokenTypeMapping = {
     8	  { "Int", "int" },
     9	  { "Identifier", "identifier" },
    10	  { "LeftParen", "l_paren" },
    11	  { "RightParen", "r_paren" },
    12	  { "RightBrace", "r_brace" },
    13	  { "LeftBrace", "l_brace" },
    14	  { "LeftBracket", "l_square" },
    15	  { "RightBracket", "r_square" },
    16	  { "Constant", "numeric_constant" },
    17	  { "Return", "return" },
    18	  { "Semi", "semi" },
    19	  { "EOF", "eof" },
    20	  { "Equal", "equal" },
    21	  { "Plus", "plus" },
    22	  { "Comma", "comma" },
    23	
    24	  // 在这里继续添加其他映射
    25	};
    26	
    27	void
    28	print_token(const antlr4::Token* token,
    29	            const antlr4::CommonTokenStream& tokens,
    30	            std::ofstream& outFile,
    31	            const antlr4::Lexer& lexer)
    32	{
    33	  auto& vocabulary = lexer.getVocabulary();
    34	
    35	  auto tokenTypeName =
    36	    std::string(vocabulary.getSymbolicName(token->getType()));
    37	
    38	  if (tokenTypeName.empty())
    39	    tokenTypeName = "<UNKNOWN>"; // 处理可能的空字符串情况
    40	
    41	  if (tokenTypeMapping.find(tokenTypeName) != tokenTypeMapping.end()) {
    42	    tokenTypeName = tokenTypeMapping[tokenTypeName];
    43	  }
    44	  std::string locInfo = " Loc=<0:0>";
    45	
    46	  bool startOfLine = false;
    47	  bool leadingSpace = false;
    48	
    49	  if (token->getText() != "<EOF>")
    50	    outFile << tokenTypeName << " '" << token->getText() << "'";
    51	  else
    52	    outFile << tokenTypeName << " '"
    53	            << "'";
    54	  if (startOfLine)
    55	    outFile << "\t [StartOfLine]";
    56	  if (leadingSpace)
    57	    outFile << " [LeadingSpace]";
    58	  outFile << locInfo << std::endl;
    59	}
    60
